category_title: Desktop monitor with tilt swivel stand
prompt: A 24-inch office desktop monitor with a rectangular display shell, a slim central neck, and a flat pedestal base with a small control bank under the lower bezel. The screen housing tilts on a horizontal revolute hinge at the top of the neck, the whole stand swivels continuously about a vertical axis where the neck meets the base, and the visible menu buttons under the bezel are separate small prismatic push buttons. Standard office-desk scale.
label: Office monitor with tilt swivel and buttons

category_title: Desktop monitor with tilt swivel stand
prompt: A professional design monitor with a broad screen shell, a tall height-adjustable stand column, a compact base plate, and a row of front controls tucked below the bezel. The display tilts on a horizontal hinge at the top of the stand, the display housing rotates continuously about the viewing-axis center for portrait or landscape orientation, the stand column slides prismatically for height adjustment, and each visible front control button moves independently as a small prismatic push control. Large desktop studio scale.
label: Design monitor with height slide and portrait rotation

category_title: Desktop monitor with tilt swivel stand
prompt: A gaming desktop monitor with a wide curved screen shell, a split rear support yoke, and a tripod-style base with a control cluster on the underside of the lower edge. The display tilts on a horizontal revolute joint carried between the yoke arms, the monitor swivels continuously about a vertical axis at the base of the stand, and the visible underside control buttons are independent small prismatic push buttons rather than one fused strip. Large desk gaming setup scale.
label: Curved gaming monitor with yoke tilt

category_title: Desktop monitor with tilt swivel stand
prompt: A compact business monitor with a boxy screen housing, a telescoping stand neck, a rounded pedestal base, and a lower-edge power rocker beside three menu buttons. The screen tilts on a horizontal hinge where the housing meets the stand head, the stand swivels continuously on a vertical axis above the base, the stand neck slides prismatically for height adjustment, the power rocker rotates on its short local pivot, and the three menu buttons are separate small prismatic push controls. Small office desktop scale.
label: Business monitor with rocker and height adjust

category_title: Desktop monitor with tilt swivel stand
prompt: A premium desktop monitor with a thin display shell, a heavy stand column, a broad base plate, and a rear cable-cover door on the stand spine. The screen housing tilts on a horizontal revolute hinge at the stand head, rotates continuously about its central viewing axis to switch between landscape and portrait, the stand swivels continuously about a vertical axis at the base, the stand column slides prismatically for height adjustment, and the rear cable-cover door rotates on a small hinge along the stand spine. High-end workstation desk scale.
label: Premium monitor with portrait rotation and cable door
